name: Peanut Brittle and Chocolate and Galabé Sugar Crèmeux
steps: Mix and dissolve the water, glucose and caster sugar. Heat to 150°C.
Mix in the chopped peanuts and pour onto baking parchment. Place another sheet of parchment over the top and roll out as thinly as possible. Leave to cool.
Finely chop the hardened, cold brittle.
Combine the white sugar and butter, mix until fluffy.
Add the egg and mix thoroughly.
Sift the flour and baking powder, then add to the mixture (above).
Sprinkle the dough out onto a baking sheet and bake at 160°C for 15 minutes. Break into pieces.
Bag and keep in the dry store. (label 1 month)
Pour the cream to 90°C and add sugar and pectine then cook to 90°C.
Pour a third of the milk over the yolks.
Combine the custard with the chocolate and the soaked gelatine and blend with hand blender.
Pass and pour into a plastic container.
Wrap and keep in the fridge for 1 day before use. (label 5 days)

other_details.storage: Bag and keep in the dry store. (label 1 month), Wrap and keep in the fridge for 1 day before use. (label 5 days)
